# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().splitlines()
    N = int(data[0])
    canonical_forms = set()

    for i in range(1, N + 1):
        s = data[i]
        rev = s[::-1]
        canonical = min(s, rev)
        canonical_forms.add(canonical)

    print(len(canonical_forms))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
